name: io.github.onenomad-llc/engram-mcp
description: Engram — memory MCP server for Claude Code. LLM-powered extraction, hybrid ANN search, tier lifecycle, spreading activation, procedural rules, WAL, Mem0, and session-state.

environmentVariables.name: OPENROUTER_API_KEY
environmentVariables.description: OpenRouter API key for LLM-powered extraction and re-ranking. Any model on openrouter.ai works. Without this, extraction/re-rank features are disabled.

environmentVariables.name: ENGRAM_DATA_DIR
environmentVariables.description: Directory for the LanceDB store and WAL. Defaults to ~/.claude/engram.
